title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. brachypus
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. brachypus, also known as Hieracium brachypus, is a subspecies of a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. brachypus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
